protocol.scope: read-only localization after the rejected M1i 4-of-5 pilot; fresh dev episodes; no training, model selection, formal validation, or test access
protocol.correct_reference: frozen M1f context at the matching earlier reference query; metadata is evaluator-only
protocol.query_oracle: replace M1i context only at return-conflict query tokens with the correct earlier reference; preserve the normal M1i context trajectory everywhere else
protocol.pfc_hidden_probe: zero-training raw cosine geometry over causal prior proposal tokens; diagnostic only and never a progression gate

category_contract.downstream_recall_failure: normal prediction is wrong and even the query-only correct-context oracle remains wrong
category_contract.context_precision_insufficient: the query-only correct-context oracle fixes the miss, but query-time context already wins the correct-vs-wrong pair test
category_contract.no_causal_history: the last proposal at or before the query has no prior proposal token
category_contract.no_correct_exact_history: no prior proposal from the correct reference segment has structural cosine at least signature_match_cosine
category_contract.attention_source_ambiguous_or_wrong: a correct exact candidate exists, but aggregate attention mass on the correct segment is not strictly larger than every competing segment
category_contract.archival_value_geometry_wrong: attention source passes, but the attended archival context does not prefer the correct over wrong reference by pair_margin_epsilon
category_contract.successful_call_later_overwritten: an earlier final-segment proposal had call as argmax, a correct archival value, and a correct emitted context, but query-time context is wrong
category_contract.correct_history_not_installed: the last archival context is correct, the query-only oracle fixes the miss, but query-time emitted context is wrong and no earlier successful call was later overwritten

forbidden_during_audit: room, segment, position, path, return-reference, or place metadata entering model forward
changing model parameters, temperatures, null, thresholds, category priority, or sample count after seeing seed 10932
using force-call, hard persistence, slots, a second fast-weight matrix, or a new trained probe
claiming raw pfc_hidden cosine geometry is a trained Transformer caller
protocol.post_result_rule: write the frozen category table and branch classification first; do not train or tune on seed 10932; any new retention, transport, or native-pfc-hidden caller requires a separate protocol and a new generator seed
